Способы оплаты, условия доставки и возвр: Payment methods, delivery and return conditions for B2B clients of DC Bakery. Minimum order 15,000 tenge, free delivery.
Visa / Mastercard через защищённую платё: Visa / Mastercard through the secure payment page of the acquiring bank. Card details are entered on the bank's side and are not stored on the website. Funds are debited at the time of ordering.
При заказе от 15 000 тенге доставка бесп: For orders over 15,000 tenge, delivery is free.

При выявлении производственного брака По: If a manufacturing defect is detected, the Supplier will make a replacement, additional delivery or refund.
Возврат средств по оплате картой — на ту: Refund of funds paid by card - to the same card within 10 working days from the date of approval of the return.

о заключении договора поставки продукции: on concluding an agreement for the supply of DC Bakery products
Редакция от 14 июля 2026 года.&ensp;г. А: Edited July 14, 2026 g. Almaty, Republic of Kazakhstan.
Индивидуальный предприниматель Кошкаров: Individual entrepreneur Koshkarov Asylbek Kasymbekovich (IIN/BIN 810127300096), registered as an individual entrepreneur on the basis of State Registration Coupon No. KZ26TWQ02214961 dated January 26, 2025, hereinafter referred to as the “Supplier”, offers this public offer (hereinafter referred to as the “Offer”) legal entities and individual entrepreneurs (hereinafter referred to as the “Buyer”, jointly - the “Parties”) enter into an agreement for the supply of products on the conditions set out below.
1.1. Продукция — хлебобулочные и кондите: 1.1. Products - bakery and confectionery products, desserts, semi-finished products and other products of the Supplier, presented in the catalog on the website dc-bakery.kz and/or in the WhatsApp catalog.
1.2. Сайт — интернет-ресурс Поставщика п: 1.2. Website - the Supplier’s Internet resource at dc-bakery.kz.
1.3. Заказ — оформленный Покупателем зап: 1.3. Order - a request issued by the Buyer for the supply of Products indicating the names, quantities and conditions of receipt.
1.4. Акцепт — полное и безоговорочное пр: 1.4. Acceptance - full and unconditional acceptance by the Buyer of the terms of this Offer in accordance with section 3.
2.1. Поставщик обязуется передавать в со: 2.1. The Supplier undertakes to transfer into ownership of the Buyer the Products under confirmed Orders, and the Buyer undertakes to accept and pay for the Products under the terms of this Offer.
2.2. Наименование, ассортимент, количест: 2.2. The name, range, quantity and price of Products are determined in each Order and confirmed by the Supplier.
3.1. Акцептом настоящей Оферты является: 3.1. Acceptance of this Offer is the Buyer placing an Order on the Site or through the WhatsApp catalog and/or payment for the Products. From the moment of acceptance, the agreement is considered concluded on the terms of the Offer and has the force of a written agreement.
3.2. Акцептуя Оферту, Покупатель подтвер: 3.2. By accepting the Offer, the Buyer confirms that he has read and agrees with its terms and the Supplier's Privacy Policy.
3.3. Поставщик вправе в любое время изме: 3.3. The Supplier has the right to change the terms of the Offer at any time; The current edition is posted on the Site. The version in force at the time of placing the relevant Order is applied to the relations between the Parties.
4.1. Покупатель формирует Заказ через Са: 4.1. The Buyer forms an Order via the Website or WhatsApp catalogue, indicating the names, quantity of Products and delivery/receipt details.
4.2. Заказ считается принятым к исполнен: 4.2. The order is considered accepted for execution after it is confirmed by the Supplier’s manager (on the Website, via WhatsApp or in another agreed way).
4.3. Поставщик вправе отказать в подтвер: 4.3. The Supplier has the right to refuse to confirm the Order or offer its adjustment (availability of Products, minimum quantity, production and delivery times).
5.1. Цены на Продукцию указываются на Са: 5.1. Prices for Products are indicated on the Site and/or in the invoice issued for payment and are valid at the time of confirmation of the Order.
5.2. Оплата производится одним из способ: 5.2. Payment is made in one of the following ways: (a) by bank card on the Site (Internet acquiring); (b) on an invoice for payment by bank transfer.
5.3. Оплата по счёту производится на бан: 5.3. Payment for the invoice is made to the Supplier’s bank account corresponding to the Product category: (a) confectionery, bakery products and desserts - to the “Bakery” account; (b) semi-finished products - to the account “Semi-finished products workshop”. Account details are in section 17.
5.4. Цены указаны в тенге. Поставщик не: 5.4. Prices are indicated in tenge. The supplier is not a payer of value added tax (VAT); sales of Products are not subject to VAT.
5.5. Оплата Продукции производится на ус: 5.5. Payment for the Products is made on consignment terms for a period of 3 (three) – 4 (four) calendar days from the date of shipment. Upon expiration of the consignment period, the goods are considered sold and are subject to full payment by the Buyer, regardless of the fact of its sale to the final consumer; Non-sale of goods is not grounds for non-payment. Shipment of Products is carried out upon confirmation of the Order and does not depend on the fact of payment.
5.6. При наличии у Покупателя задолженно: 5.6. If the Buyer has a debt (Products not paid upon expiration of the consignment period), the Supplier has the right to unilaterally and without prior notice suspend deliveries, not accept new Orders until the debt is fully repaid, or accept them only on the terms of advance payment by bank card.
5.7. Обязательство по оплате считается и: 5.7. The payment obligation is considered fulfilled from the moment the funds are received into the Supplier's account.
6.1. Поставщик вправе проводить маркетин: 6.1. The supplier has the right to conduct marketing campaigns and provide bonuses (including additional products “as a gift”, discounts, special conditions), independently determining their conditions.
6.2. Условия каждой акции (период провед: 6.2. The conditions of each promotion (period, list and quantity of Products, mechanics and restrictions) are published by the Supplier on the Site and/or in the catalog and are an integral part of this Offer for the period of the corresponding promotion. Example of mechanics: when ordering a certain number of units of Products, the Buyer is provided with one or more additional units of Products as a gift.
6.3. Поставщик вправе в одностороннем по: 6.3. The Supplier has the right to unilaterally introduce, change, suspend or terminate any promotions early, limit the number of participants and the number of bonus products by posting information on the Site, without paying any compensation to the Buyer.
6.4. Бонусная (подарочная) продукция и п: 6.4. Bonus (gift) products and discounts provided are not subject to exchange, return or replacement with monetary compensation. Bonus (gift) products are subject to the same acceptance conditions and quality requirements as the main Products.
6.5. Если иное прямо не указано в услови: 6.5. Unless otherwise expressly stated in the terms of the promotion, promotions and discounts cannot be combined with each other. Placing an Order as part of the promotion means the Buyer agrees with its terms.
6.6. Проводимые акции не являются публич: 6.6. The ongoing promotions are not a public promise of a reward, a public competition or a lottery; Bonuses are provided within the framework of the execution of this agreement.
7.1. Способ получения Продукции (доставк: 7.1. The method of receiving the Products (delivery or pickup), delivery times and costs are agreed upon by the Parties upon confirmation of the Order.
7.2. Минимальная сумма одного Заказа сос: 7.2. The minimum amount of one Order is 15,000 (fifteen thousand) tenge. For an Order worth less than 15,000 tenge, the Supplier has the right to set an additional delivery fee in the amount of 1,500 to 3,000 tenge at its discretion. When ordering an amount not less than the minimum, delivery is free.
7.3. Доставка/передача Продукции осущест: 7.3. Delivery/transfer of Products is carried out within the time limits agreed upon by the Parties upon confirmation of the Order.
7.4. Право собственности и риск случайно: 7.4. Ownership and risk of accidental loss or damage to the Products passes to the Buyer upon delivery of the Products to the Buyer or his authorized representative.
8.1. Продукция является скоропортящимся: 8.1. The product is a perishable food product. The Buyer is obliged to check the quantity and quality of the Products immediately at the time of acceptance.
8.2. Претензии по количеству (недостача): 8.2. Claims regarding quantity (shortages) and obvious defects in quality are made at the time of acceptance and are recorded in an act or a note in the accompanying document. After signing the delivery note, claims regarding quantity and quality are not accepted.
8.3. Подписание Покупателем товарной нак: 8.3. The Buyer’s signing of the delivery note confirms the fact of delivery of the Products, the conformity of their quantity and quality and the absence of claims from the Buyer.
9.1. Возврат Продукции не допускается, з: 9.1. Returns of Products are not permitted, except in cases of manufacturing defects confirmed by the Supplier.
9.2. При выявлении в момент приёмки недо: 9.2. If a shortage or manufacturing defect is identified at the time of acceptance, the Supplier, in agreement with the Buyer, replaces the Products, additionally delivers them, or returns their cost.
9.3. Порча Продукции, нарушение условий: 9.3. Damage to the Products, violation of storage conditions or terms due to the Buyer's fault are not grounds for returning or replacing the Products and are paid by the Buyer in full.
9.4. Возврат денежных средств по Заказу,: 9.4. Refunds for an Order paid by bank card are made to the same bank card within the period established by the rules of the payment system and the acquiring bank, usually up to 10 (ten) business days from the date of approval of the return.
9.5. Контакты для претензий: e-mail info: 9.5. Contacts for complaints: e-mail info@dc-bakery.kz, tel. +7 747 727 2650, +7 747 694 0766.
10. Права и обязанности сторон: 10. Rights and obligations of the parties
10.1. Поставщик обязуется передавать Про: 10.1. The Supplier undertakes to transfer Products of proper quality in accordance with confirmed Orders and legal requirements.
10.2. Покупатель обязуется своевременно: 10.2. The Buyer undertakes to promptly accept and pay for the Products, ensure proper acceptance conditions and provide reliable data when placing an Order.

11.1. За неисполнение или ненадлежащее и: 11.1. For failure to fulfill or improper fulfillment of obligations, the Parties are liable in accordance with the legislation of the Republic of Kazakhstan and this Offer.
11.2. За просрочку оплаты Покупатель упл: 11.2. 11.3. Уплата пени не освобождает Покупат: 11.3. Payment of the penalty does not relieve the Buyer from fulfilling the payment obligation.
